{{Quote|A thousand different alien species tug the galaxy in a thousand different directions.|Lord Superior Bosmihi|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''[[Lord Superior]] Bosmihi''' was the leader of the [[Kroctari]] people, and their government, the [[Unified Factions]].

Bosmihi was one of the first to make contact with [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], after what seemed to be his return from the [[Death/Legends|dead]]. What Bosmihi did not know was that Thrawn was still dead and the return of Thrawn was really a cleverly orchestrated operation lead by [[Grodin Tierce (clone)|Grodin Tierce]] and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]], and played by [[Flim (Human)|Flim]], who looked remarkably like Thrawn.
